adamant_arrowheads.description: A bundle of metal arrowheads for assembling finished arrows.
adamant_arrowheads.acquisition: Mainly produced through Smithing at level 30 at an anvil using Adamant Bar. A hammer is also required.
adamant_arrowheads.uses: Used in Fletching recipes that produce Adamant Arrows x15.

adamant_arrows.description: A finished bundle of arrows made through Fletching.
adamant_arrows.acquisition: Mainly produced through Fletching at level 34 using Adamant Arrowheads x15 and Maple Headless Arrows x15.
adamant_arrows.uses: Can be sold to Advanced Fletcher.

adamant_axe_head.description: A metal component used in later assembly recipes.
adamant_axe_head.acquisition: Mainly produced through Smithing at level 31 at an anvil using Adamant Bar x2. A hammer is also required.
adamant_axe_head.uses: Used in Crafting recipes that produce Adamant Axe.

adamant_bar.description: A refined metal bar used in later Smithing and Crafting recipes.
adamant_bar.acquisition: Mainly produced through Smithing at level 30 at a furnace using Adamant ore and Coal x6.
adamant_bar.uses: Used in Smithing recipes that produce Adamant Arrowheads x15, Adamant Axe Head, Adamant Boots, Adamant Helmet, Adamant Pickaxe Head, Adamant Platebody, Adamant Platelegs, Adamant Shield, and Adamant Sword Blade.

adamant_ore.description: A gathered ore resource used for smelting bars and other metalworking recipes.
adamant_ore.acquisition: Usually sold by Thrain Deepforge in Starter Town.
adamant_ore.uses: Used in Smithing recipes that produce Adamant Bar. Can be sold to Thrain Deepforge.

adamant_pickaxe_head.description: A metal component used in later assembly recipes.
adamant_pickaxe_head.acquisition: Mainly produced through Smithing at level 31 at an anvil using Adamant Bar x2. A hammer is also required.
adamant_pickaxe_head.uses: Used in Crafting recipes that produce Adamant Pickaxe.

adamant_sword_blade.description: A metal component used in later assembly recipes.
adamant_sword_blade.acquisition: Mainly produced through Smithing at level 31 at an anvil using Adamant Bar x2. A hammer is also required.
adamant_sword_blade.uses: Used in Crafting recipes that produce Adamant Sword.

bronze_arrows.description: A finished bundle of arrows made through Fletching.
bronze_arrows.acquisition: Mainly produced through Fletching at level 1 using Bronze Arrowheads x15 and Wooden Headless Arrows x15.
bronze_arrows.uses: Can be sold to Advanced Fletcher.

bronze_axe_head.description: A metal component used in later assembly recipes.
bronze_axe_head.acquisition: Mainly produced through Smithing at level 1 at an anvil using Bronze Bar x2. A hammer is also required.
bronze_axe_head.uses: Used in Crafting recipes that produce Bronze Axe.

bronze_bar.description: A refined metal bar used in later Smithing and Crafting recipes.
bronze_bar.acquisition: Mainly produced through Smithing at level 1 at a furnace using Copper ore and Tin ore.
bronze_bar.uses: Used in Smithing recipes that produce Bronze Arrowheads x15, Bronze Axe Head, Bronze Boots, Bronze Helmet, Bronze Pickaxe Head, Bronze Platebody, Bronze Platelegs, Bronze Shield, and Bronze Sword Blade.

bronze_pickaxe_head.description: A metal component used in later assembly recipes.
bronze_pickaxe_head.acquisition: Mainly produced through Smithing at level 1 at an anvil using Bronze Bar x2. A hammer is also required.
bronze_pickaxe_head.uses: Used in Crafting recipes that produce Bronze Pickaxe.

bronze_sword_blade.description: A metal component used in later assembly recipes.

bronze_sword_blade.uses: Used in Crafting recipes that produce Bronze Sword.

coal.description: A gathered ore resource used for smelting bars and other metalworking recipes.
coal.acquisition: Usually gathered through Mining from Coal Rock nodes at level 20 in Starter Town. Usually sold by Borin Ironvein in North Road Camp and Starter Town.
coal.uses: Used in Smithing recipes that produce Adamant Bar, Mithril Bar, Rune Bar, and Steel Bar. Can be sold to Borin Ironvein.

copper_ore.description: A gathered ore resource used for smelting bars and other metalworking recipes.
copper_ore.acquisition: Usually gathered through Mining from Copper Rock nodes at level 1 in North Road Camp and Starter Town. Usually sold by Borin Ironvein in North Road Camp and Starter Town.
copper_ore.uses: Used in Smithing recipes that produce Bronze Bar. Can be sold to Borin Ironvein.

gold_bar.acquisition: Mainly produced through Smithing at level 40 at a furnace using Gold ore.
gold_bar.uses: Used in Smithing recipes that produce Gold Amulet, Gold Ring, and Gold Tiara.

gold_ore.description: A gathered ore resource used for smelting bars and other metalworking recipes.
